title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
